name: MOLINA HEALTHCARE, INC.
business: Molina Healthcare, Inc. provides managed healthcare services under the Medicaid and Medicare programs and through state insurance marketplaces, serving approximately 5.5 million members across 21 states as of December 31, 2025.
sellsTo: Individuals enrolled in government-sponsored healthcare programs (Medicaid, Medicare, Marketplace)

exposures.sentence: Molina Healthcare, Inc., a FORTUNE 500 company, provides managed healthcare services under the Medicaid and Medicare programs, and through the state insurance marketplaces (the Marketplace).
We are making appreciable investments in deploying artificial intelligence (AI) tools to enhance effectiveness and create efficiency.

catalysts.event: Idaho Medicaid and Medicare contract commenced
catalysts.sentence: Our new contract with the Idaho Department of Health and Welfare commenced on January 1, 2026.
Our new contract commenced on January 1, 2026 in select regions.
Our new contract commenced on January 1, 2026.
Our new contract commenced on January 1, 2026.
The contract commenced on January 1, 2026 and is expected to have a duration of two years, with an option for three two-year extensions.
The new contract commenced on January 1, 2026 and will run through December 31, 2030, with one two-year extension.
The new contract commenced on January 1, 2026.
Our new contract with the Mississippi Division of Medicaid commenced on July 1, 2025.
Effective February 1, 2025, we closed on our acquisition of ConnectiCare Holding Company, Inc. (ConnectiCare), a wholly owned subsidiary of EmblemHealth, Inc.
The contract commenced on February 1, 2025 and will run through December 31, 2030.
As result, our contracts with DMAS terminated effective June 30, 2025.

catalysts.event: Private offering of $850 million 6.500% Senior Notes due 2031 completed
catalysts.sentence: On November 20, 2025 (the Settlement Date), we completed a private offering of $850 million aggregate principal amount of our 6.500% Senior Notes due 2031

catalysts.event: Florida Kids contract expected to commence
catalysts.sentence: This contract is expected to cover approximately 120,000 enrollees and yield $6 billion in annual premium revenue and is expected to commence in the fourth quarter of 2026.
